text: JD: Senior Backend Engineer at a fintech requiring Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS. Strong match: 6+ yrs Python, owned a payment service on EKS, deep transactional integrity, runbooks for on-call.
JD: Mid-level React Frontend Engineer for a SaaS dashboard. Strong match: 3-4 yrs React + TypeScript, shipped accessible component library, Cypress E2E, Lighthouse > 90.
JD: Senior ML Engineer in healthcare AI. Strong match: PyTorch + MONAI experience, productionized clinical NLP model, owns model registry, SOC2 + HIPAA awareness, MICCAI paper a plus.
JD: Data Engineer at an analytics company. Strong match: 4+ yrs Spark/Airflow, dbt models for Snowflake, partition tuning at TB scale, owned a streaming pipeline (Kafka -> Iceberg).
JD: DevOps Engineer for a Kubernetes platform team. Strong match: Terraform + Helm + ArgoCD, wrote a custom Kubernetes operator, GitOps experience, AWS solutions architect cert.
JD: Junior Data Scientist at a retail e-commerce startup. Strong match: 0-2 yrs, Kaggle medals, built recsys prototypes, comfortable with pandas + scikit-learn, conveys results clearly.
JD: iOS Engineer for a fitness app. Strong match: 3+ yrs Swift + SwiftUI, HealthKit integration, App Store releases owned, Combine and async/await fluency.
JD: Site Reliability Engineer at a high-traffic ad-tech firm. Strong match: 5+ yrs, SLO engineering, owned Prometheus + Grafana stack, wrote postmortems, Go for control-plane tooling.
JD: LLM Engineer for an AI productivity startup. Strong match: RAG systems in production (LangChain or LlamaIndex), familiarity with Qdrant/Weaviate, evals harness, prompt versioning.
JD: Security Engineer at a payments platform. Strong match: 4+ yrs appsec, SAST/DAST tooling, threat modeling, OWASP Top 10 fluency, OSCP a plus, hands-on incident response.
JD: Senior Full-Stack Engineer at an early-stage SaaS startup. Strong match: ships features end-to-end (React + Node + Postgres), comfortable owning CI, infra-as-code, has 0->1 startup history.
JD: NLP Engineer for a legal-tech firm. Strong match: 3+ yrs, transformer fine-tuning, span extraction / NER, comfortable with Hugging Face Trainer, evaluation against domain-specific test sets.
JD: Computer Vision Engineer for an autonomous-vehicle perception team. Strong match: PyTorch + ROS2, multi-sensor fusion (LiDAR + camera), CUDA optimization, KITTI/nuScenes experience.
JD: MLOps Engineer at a series-B AI company. Strong match: Kubeflow or Metaflow in production, MLflow + model registry, feature stores, drift monitoring with Evidently or Great Expectations.
JD: Cloud Architect for a regulated industry migration. Strong match: AWS or Azure pro-level certs, designed multi-account landing zones, network segmentation, FinOps cost optimization.
JD: Test Automation Engineer for a fintech. Strong match: 4+ yrs Selenium/Playwright + pytest/Jest, contract testing with Pact, owned a test pyramid, integrated tests into CI.
JD: Engineering Manager (5 IC team). Strong match: 7+ yrs IC + 2+ yrs management, ran weekly 1:1s, drove perf calibration, technical depth to unblock teams without micromanaging.
JD: Embedded Systems Engineer for IoT consumer hardware. Strong match: C/C++ on ARM Cortex-M, RTOS familiarity, BLE stack, low-power design, JTAG debugging.
JD: Senior Database Administrator. Strong match: 7+ yrs Postgres + MySQL, replication topologies, query plan tuning, backup/restore runbooks, on-call experience for tier-1 systems.
JD: Developer Relations Engineer for a developer-tools startup. Strong match: prior IC eng background, conference talks, open-source contributions, technical writing portfolio.
